task_completion.description: Fix the drug accumulation logic to be additive across multiple doses.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project directory is /home/ga/PycharmProjects/pk_tools. The three bugs require specific mathematical fixes in the source code: 1) Elimination rate (kel) must use division (e.g., ln(2) / half_life). 2) Multi-dose accumulation logic must be additive (adding new dose concentration to existing). 3) AUC trapezoidal calculation loop must iterate len(time)-1 times. The final output must be generated at output/patient_732_sim.csv using generate_report.py. Test files and data files must remain untouched.
